FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: Middle East Tensions Support Dollar While ECB Dovishness Limits Yen Strength
tldr_points: Geopolitical risk premium from Iran tensions favors USD over JPY
ECB's Simkus rules out April rate hike, weakening euro and supporting USD/JPY cross
Technical setup shows bullish reversal potential at key support zones
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY positioned to appreciate as Middle East risk and ECB dovishness create favorable conditions for dollar strength.
FX.comment: Geopolitical risk premium favors USD over JPY while ECB dovishness reinforces dollar strength
